name: neosoul-decision-agent
tagline: ClawHub (303★): Structured decision support with self-improving memory. Agent learns your decision style, risk profile, and framework prefe
verdict: Solid core: security A, quality B. Weak spots: the skill's name doesn't match kebab-case or its own directory, a mismatch that could confuse skill resolution; and its retrospective and decision-stats templates are only bracket placeholders, never shown filled in with a real example.

highlights.summary: The bespoke retrospective log format and the Decision Stats format (156-172) are given only as bracket-placeholder templates; neither is ever shown filled in with a real, concrete
name is not kebab-case (spaces, capitals, a '+'); the separate slug field 'decision-making' (line 3) is kebab-case but does not match the bulk export directory name 'neosoul-decisi
The 'Scope > NEVER' block (lines 249-255) bounds what the skill itself will do, but the skill nowhere says 'NOT for X, use skill Y instead' or names adjacent misuse cases / better-
